---
title: "Course schedule"
---

::: {.callout-note}
**Apart** from the **starting time** the time schedule is **indicative**. Because we can not plan a course by the minute, in practice the time points will deviate. 
:::

## Day 1

| block         | start | end   | topic                                                        | instructors                 | presentation | exercise |
|---------------|-------|-------|--------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------|--------------|----------|
| introduction  | 9:00  | 9:30  | Introduction to the course                                   | Deepak Tanwar                |  [link](../assets/pdf/01_introduction.pdf) | |
| block 1       | 9:30  | 10:15 | Introduction to spatial omics                                | Joana Carlevaro-Fita         |  [link](../assets/pdf/02_introduction_spatial_omics.pdf)  | |
| break         | 10:15 | 10:45 | Coffee break                                                 |                              | | |
| block 2       | 10:45 | 11:45 | Segmentation                                                 | Ivan Berest                  |  [link](../assets/pdf/03_space_ranger_spe.pdf) | |
| block 3       | 11:45 | 12:30 | Lecture: pre-processing, and data structure                  | Deepak Tanwar                |  [link](../assets/pdf/03_space_ranger_spe.pdf) | |
| break         | 12:30 | 13:30 | Lunch                                                        |                              | | |
| block 3       | 1:30  | 2:00  | Exercise: setup and data structure                           | Deepak Tanwar, Julien Roux   | | [Setup](../day1/day1-0_setup.qmd), [Exercise 1](../day1/day1-1_SpatialExperiment.qmd) |
| block 4       | 2:00  | 3:30  | Quality control and normalization (sequencing-based)         | Deepak Tanwar                |  [link](../assets/pdf/04_qc_norm.pdf)  | [Exercise 2](../day1/day1-2_spotsweeper_qc.qmd) |
| break         | 3:30  | 4:00  | Coffee break                                                 |                              | | |
| block 4       | 4:00  | 5:00  | Quality control (image-based)                                | Ivan Berest                  |  [link](../assets/pdf/05_qc_img.pdf)  | [Exercise 3](../day1/day1-3_img_qc.qmd) |

## Day 2

| block   | start | end   | topic                                                 | instructors                       | presentation | exercise |
|---------|-------|-------|-------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------|--------------|----------|
| recap   | 9:00  | 9:15  | Recap from day 1                                      | Joana Carlevaro-Fita              |  |  |
| block 1 | 9:15  | 10:15 | Normalization and scaling                             | Deepak Tanwar                     |  [link](../assets/pdf/06_normalization.pdf)  | [Exercise 4](../day1/day2-1_normalization.qmd) |
| break   | 10:15 | 10:45 | Coffee break                                          |                                   |  |  |
| block 2 | 10:45 | 11:30 | Lecture: feature selection, dimensionality reduction  | Joana Carlevaro-Fita              |  [link](../assets/pdf/07_feature_selection_dim_red.pdf) | |
| block 2 | 11:30 | 12:30 | Exercise: feature selection, dimensionality reduction | Joana Carlevaro-Fita, Julien Roux | |  [Exercise 5](../day2/day2-2_feature_dimred.qmd)  |
| break   | 12:30 | 13:30 | Lunch                                                 |                                   | | |
| block 3 | 1:30  | 2:00  | Lecture: clustering                                   | Joana Carlevaro-Fita              |  [link](../assets/pdf/08_clustering.pdf)  | |
| block 3 | 2:00  | 2:45  | Exercise: clustering and visualization                | Joana Carlevaro-Fita, Julien Roux | | [Exercise 6](../day2/day2-3_clustering_find_markers.qmd) |
| break   | 2:45  | 3:15  | Coffee break                                          |                                   |  |  |
| block 4 | 3:15  | 3:45  | Lecture: annotation                                   | Ivan Berest                       | [link](../assets/pdf/09_annotation.pdf) |  |
| block 4 | 3:45  | 4:45  | Exercise: annotation                                  | Ivan Berest, Julien Roux          | | [Exercise 7](../day2/day2-4_annotation.qmd) |

## Day 3

| block       | start | end   | topic                                                 | instructors                       | presentation | exercise |
|-------------|-------|-------|-------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------|--------------|----------|
| recap       | 9:00  | 9:15  | Recap from day 1                                      | Joana Carlevaro-Fita              |  |  |
| block 1     | 9:15  | 10:15 | Spatial statistics                                    | Mark Robinson                     | [link](../assets/pdf/10_stats_methods.pdf) |  |
| break       | 10:15 | 10:45 | Coffee break                                          |                                   | |  |
| block 2     | 10:45 | 12:30 | Co-localization analysis                              | Martin Emons                      | [link](../assets/pdf/11_spastat_lecture.pdf)  | [Exercise 8](../day3/day3-1_spatial_stats.qmd) |
| break       | 12:30 | 13:30 | Lunch                                                 |                                   | | |
| block 3     | 1:30  | 3:00  | SVG and DSP for spatial data                          | Peiying Cai                       |  [SVG and DSP](../assets/pdf/12_svg_dsp.pdf) | [Exercise 9](../day3/day3-2_svg_feature_set_signatures.qmd), [Exercise 10](../day3/day3-3_differential_spatial_pattern.qmd) |
| break       | 3:00  | 3:30  | Coffee break                                          |                                   |  |  |
| post-course | 4:45  | 5:00  | Post-course information                               | Deepak Tanwar                     | [link](../assets/pdf/13_post_course.pdf)  | |
